data.name: Agate-Blade Assassin
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, defending player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: Some lizardfolk wield the precious agate and yearn for fire. Others wield it and thirst for blood.

data.name: Bakersbane Duo
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a Food token.
Whenever you expend 4, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
data.flavor_text: "I'll take the crust!" chittered the squirrel. "And I'll take the filling!" drooled the raccoon.

data.name: Beza, the Bounding Spring
data.oracle_text: When Beza enters, create a Treasure token if an opponent controls more lands than you. You gain 4 life if an opponent has more life than you. Create two 1/1 blue Fish creature tokens if an opponent controls more creatures than you. Draw a card if an opponent has more cards in hand than you.

data.name: Blossoming Sands
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.

data.name: Brightblade Stoat
data.oracle_text: First strike, lifelink
data.flavor_text: Brightblades are trained to constantly mind the sun's position, adjusting the angle of their dagger to maximize glare.

data.name: Bumbleflower's Sharepot
data.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
{5}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target nonland permanent. Activate only as a sorcery.

data.name: Cache Grab
data.oracle_text: Mill four cards. You may put a permanent card from among the cards milled this way into your hand. If you control a Squirrel or returned a Squirrel card to your hand this way, create a Food token. (To mill four cards, put the top four cards of your library into your graveyard. A Food token is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

data.name: Carrot Cake
data.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters and when you sacrifice it, create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token and scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.
data.flavor_text:
"Secret ingredient? What do you think?"
—Ms. Bumbleflower

data.name: For the Common Good
data.oracle_text: Create X tokens that are copies of target token you control. Then tokens you control gain indestructible until your next turn. You gain 1 life for each token you control.
data.flavor_text: Despite their differences, every creature and culture of Valley stood in unison against the threat.

data.name: Glidedive Duo
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text:
"Catch the thermal!" called the bat.
"What's a thermal?!" cried the lizard.

data.name: Hazel's Nocturne
data.oracle_text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
data.flavor_text: On stormy autumn days, the leaves in the trees chitter and whisper.

data.name: Heaped Harvest
data.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters and when you sacrifice it, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.
data.flavor_text: One can travel all of Valley and never eat the same meal twice.

data.name: Helga, Skittish Seer
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast a creature spell with mana value 4 or greater, you draw a card, gain 1 life, and put a +1/+1 counter on Helga.
{T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is Helga's power. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells with mana value 4 or greater or creature spells with {X} in their mana costs.

data.name: Lifecreed Duo
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "Why are you eating upside down?" asked the bird. "Why are you eating upside up?" replied the bat.

data.name: Moonrise Cleric
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: "The sunrisers have entrusted me with their life force. I intend to repay them bountifully."

data.name: Muerra, Trash Tactician
data.oracle_text:
At the beginning of your first main phase, add {R} or {G} for each Raccoon you control.
Whenever you expend 4, you gain 3 life. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
Whenever you expend 8, exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

data.name: Pawpatch Formation
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature with flying.
• Destroy target enchantment.
• Draw a card. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

data.name: Savor
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
data.flavor_text: Edibility is in the eye of the beholder.

data.name: Scales of Shale
data.oracle_text:
Affinity for Lizards (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Lizard you control.)
Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.

data.name: Scavenger's Talent
data.oracle_text:
(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
Whenever one or more creatures you control die, create a Food token. This ability triggers only once each turn.
{1}{B}: Level 2
Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, target player mills two cards.
{2}{B}: Level 3
At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice three other nonland permanents. If you do, return a creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

data.name: Sinister Monolith
data.oracle_text:
At the beginning of combat on your turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
{T}, Pay 2 life, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards. Activate only as a sorcery.
data.flavor_text: Blood and brine make a strong mortar.

data.name: Sonar Strike
data.oracle_text: Sonar Strike deals 4 damage to target attacking, blocking, or tapped creature. You gain 3 life if you control a Bat.
data.flavor_text: Valley's midnight clerics channel the life force of other animals into blinding strikes and searing shrieks.

data.name: Sunshower Druid
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and you gain 1 life.
data.flavor_text: Apprentice augurs begin their studies by predicting where the rain will fall. Even those who don't succeed derive great joy from the process.

data.name: Swiftwater Cliffs
data.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

data.name: Valley Rotcaller
data.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the number of other Squirrels, Bats, Lizards, and Rats you control.
data.flavor_text:
We all share one life and one death.
—Rotcaller saying

data.name: Vinereap Mentor
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters or dies, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
data.flavor_text: "In youth, we reap. In death, we sow."

data.name: Ygra, Eater of All
data.oracle_text:
Ward—Sacrifice a Food.
Other creatures are Food artifacts in addition to their other types and have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this permanent: You gain 3 life."
Whenever a Food is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put two +1/+1 counters on Ygra.

data.name: Zoraline, Cosmos Caller
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever a Bat you control attacks, you gain 1 life.
Whenever Zoraline enters or attacks, you may pay {W}{B} and 2 life. When you do, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.
